package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_hasprefix_manual_slice_after_len: Manual `len` and slice prefix checks instead of `bytes.HasPrefix(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario451Negative(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.HasPrefix(haystack, needle)
}
